text.title: Retro Action Success Criteria Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: scaffold → write actions → measure baseline → review outcome → quarterly synth.

step.name: scaffold
step.action: Run `scaffold-action`. Per theme draft a `RetroActionItem` with empty fields.

step.name: write-actions
step.action: Run `derive-threshold`. Per item write 20+ char experiment, input_signal, measurement_source, numeric threshold ("reduce p95 from 4d to 3d"), S-prefixed deadline_sprint, owner_role from register.
step.decision-gate: Reject any item missing numeric threshold OR owner role OR S-deadline; re-prompt.

step.name: measure-baseline
step.action: Record current value for each input_signal as baseline. Attach evidence (Jira filter URL, dashboard).

step.name: review-outcome
step.input: Action items at deadline_sprint + post-period telemetry
step.action: Run `outcome-review`. Set `outcome_verdict` to met / missed / abandoned with evidence.

step.name: quarterly-synth
step.action: Identify experiments that recurred without outcome — archive. Identify thresholds that proved too lax / strict — recalibrate.
